text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally the day of the Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's so many people... And they're all here to
watch the Tokyo Daishoten?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But where did they all come from? It's not like I
advertised it much.
choice_data_list:
It's because your fans put in a lot of work for
you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: My fans? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon opened up to her fans at the
holiday handshake event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those very same fans went on to spread the word
about the Tokyo Daishoten themselves,
determined to make it the biggest ever.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
choice_data_list: They all understand how you feel.
They all understand how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, well, this is a problem. Right before the
big race and I'm getting all emotional.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I wasn't wrong. I'm glad I continued running.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My fans are all with me, giving me so much
support.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: As an Umadol, I couldn't be happier!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
choice_data_list: By shining on the biggest stage there is.
By shining on the biggest stage there is.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, you're right. How could I forget? ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: My happiness comes from standing on the stage!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get out there in front of everyone, and
I'm gonna win! After that, I'm gonna sing and
dance and convey my feelings to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Because today's the day I become a top Umadol
and shine like a star!
